data.title: IQSTEL (IQST) Stock Jumps 31% After Hours: Here's What You Should Know
data.description: IQSTEL Inc. (NASDAQ: IQST) saw a significant 30.86% surge in after-hours trading on Thursday, reaching $2.46 per share. The company provided a strategic update showcasing accelerating revenue growth and a transformation of its platform to target higher margins. For the fiscal year ending on Dec. 31, 2025, IQSTEL reported revenue of $316.9 million, marking an 11% increase from the previous year. Gross profit also saw a boost of 14.3% to $9.46 million. EBITDA stood at $2.7 million, with net income reaching nearly $2 million. Management anticipates achieving consolidated net profitability within the next year. In the fourth quarter of 2025, IQSTEL reported earnings per share of -$0.89, falling short of the estimated -$0.20. Revenue for the same period totaled $84.22 million, missing the projected $104.75 million by 19.60%. CEO Leandro Iglesias noted, "We are entering a phase where we are rapidly growing revenues..."

data.title: Aspo to publish Interim Report for January-March 2026 on Monday, April 27, 2026
data.description: Investor news from Aspo Plc on April 24, 2026, at 9:45 EEST states that Aspo is set to release their Interim Report for January-March 2026 on Monday, April 27, 2026.

data.title: Resolutions of the General Ordinary Shareholders Meeting of INVL Baltic Real Estate
data.description: On April 24, 2026, the General Ordinary Shareholders Meeting of the closed-ended real estate investment firm INVL Baltic Real Estate convened. Key decisions and resolutions were made during this meeting.

data.title: Shareholders of INVL Baltic Real Estate approved dividend allocation for the year 2025
data.description: During the General Shareholders Meeting of the Company held on April 24, 2026, it was resolved to accept the proposed dividend distribution of EUR 0.09 per share for the fiscal year 2025. The total sum allocated for dividends reaches EUR 0.714 million.
Blackrock Inc. has sent a participation notification to Syensqo.

data.title: VEON Boosts Accessibility for Investors by Waiving Depositary Service Fees on American Depositary Shares
data.description: VEON Ltd., a global digital operator, recently disclosed that beginning January 1, 2026, BNY Mellon will no longer charge depositary service fees (DSF) to investors holding VEON's American Depositary Shares (ADSs). This change will lead to a decrease in ownership costs by USD 0.05 per ADS annually. The removal of DSF charges aims to make VEON more accessible to current and potential investors, improving affordability and convenience for all parties involved.

data.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5: Faster, advanced AI excelling in coding and research, with launch on ChatGPT Plus, Pro, Business.
data.description: OpenAI introduces the latest AI model, GPT-5.5, showcasing improved speed, intelligence, and performance in coding and research tasks. The new model is compatible with ChatGPT Plus, Pro, and Business versions. Explore further for additional details on this cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Stablecoins rise as $283.7B financial backbone by Sept. 2025, from settlement tools to key infrastructure.
data.description: As of September 2025, stablecoins have evolved beyond just settlement mechanisms to become vital components of financial infrastructure, boasting a market capitalization of $283.7 billion. This growth signifies their increasing importance in the financial sector.

data.title: FIGR stock plunges 9%, but analysts predict 2x growth potential with Bernstein's $67 target on booming tokenized lending.
data.description: Stock prices plummeted by 9% due to the volatile nature of the crypto market. Despite this, Bernstein has kept a price target of $67, pointing to the increasing growth in tokenized lending as a reason for optimism.

data.title: Paxos enhances Postgres uptime with Aurora Blue-Green upgrades, slashing downtime from 30-120 to 1 min, achieving 99.99% uptime.
data.description: Using Aurora Blue-Green upgrades, Paxos successfully decreased Postgres downtime significantly, slashing it from a range of 30-120 minutes down to just 1 minute. This improvement in downtime has ensured that Paxos now meets its Service Level Objectives (SLOs) by achieving an uptime rate of 99.99%.

data.title: Recent report states BTC & ETH capital flows stabilize, ETF demand recovers, market-neutral strategies face challenges.
data.description: In the latest report from Glassnode for April, it has been highlighted that there has been a stabilization in capital flow for Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH). The report also indicates a recovery in demand for Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) related to these cryptocurrencies. However, the report also points out challenges being faced by market-neutral strategies in the current market environment. This information provides key insights for investors and traders in the cryptocurrency space.

data.title: EigenDA increases Ethereum data throughput by 450 times, enabling MegaETH and RISE rollups for high performance.
data.description: EigenDA has enhanced Ethereum scalability significantly by increasing data throughput by 450 times. This expansion has paved the way for high-performance rollups such as MegaETH and RISE to be implemented on the platform.

data.title: Duni Group: Interim report January 1 - March 31, 2026
data.description: In Malmö, Sweden, as of April 24, 2026, it was reported that there was steady progress in a demanding market from January 1 to March 31. The net sales for the quarter reached SEK 1,764 million, down slightly from the previous year by -0.3% when adjusted for exchange rate fluctuations. The numbers were relatively consistent with the previous year's figures, indicating stability in the market despite its challenges.

data.title: XRP's 8-Year Wait For New Highs To End In 2026? Here's What The Crypto Prediction Market Is Saying
data.description: Investors in the cryptocurrency market are becoming less hopeful about XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) achieving new record highs this year. According to the Polygon-based platform Polymarket, there is currently only a 13% probability of XRP surpassing its all-time peak of $3.84, established over eight years ago, by the end of December. This figure marks a substantial decrease from the 41% likelihood assigned at the start of the year. The chances of XRP hitting its historical highs by September 30 have also declined to 12%, down from 35% earlier in 2026. A total of nearly $250,000 has been bet on this particular outcome. The market outcome will be determined as "Yes" if any XRP/USDT 1-minute candle on the Binance exchange on the specified date accomplishes a final... For more information, please check the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Morgan Stanley introduces stablecoin with a $10M investment minimum in money market fund MSNXX for issuers to access.
data.description: In order to participate in the stablecoin reserve offering, creators of stablecoins are required to commit a minimum of $10 million towards Morgan Stanley's money market fund known as MSNXX.

data.title: US vows to combat widespread AI theft by Chinese firms using proxy accounts & jailbreaking techniques, says White House tech office.
data.description: According to the office of technology policy at the White House, foreign entities are utilizing proxy accounts and exploiting jailbreaking techniques to extract functionalities from American AI models.
